acquisition_outcome.result: A newly captured official NYC DOT release supplies month-bounded installation-start evidence. An already-staged official NYC DOT retrospective independently confirms delivery of the identical two-block Phase 1 during Fall 2025 and supplies the direct B41/B67 bus-lane context.

official_source_captures.title: Transformative Flatbush Avenue Bus Lane Installation Begins This Week

evidence.finding: NYC DOT announced that work would start that week.
The work starting in the announced window is explicitly center-running bus lanes on Flatbush Avenue between Livingston Street and State Street.
The release directly identifies B41 as serving nearly the entire Flatbush Avenue corridor.
The release identifies the Livingston Street-to-State Street installation as the first two blocks and forecasts completion within two weeks, weather permitting.

official_source_captures.title: Flatbush Avenue Bus Priority - Major Transportation Project Briefing - April 2026

evidence.finding: The April 2026 retrospective states that DOT installed center-running bus lanes between Livingston Street and State Street last fall, distinguishes that phase from later State Street-to-Grand Army Plaza work, and describes it as the first part of the wider multi-phase effort.
The same official briefing explicitly identifies B41 and B67 buses as traveling straight in the Flatbush Avenue bus lanes.

temporal_adjudication.installation_start_basis: The September 25 release says work will start that week; the April 2026 retrospective confirms that the identical bounded phase was installed during Fall 2025.
temporal_adjudication.installation_completion_event_dispositio: Retain the official Fall 2025 completion milestone as a separate canonical event, but do not project it as a second operational occurrence for the same two-block treatment.
rejected_inferences: The September 25 publication date is not an exact physical installation or operational activation day.
The weather-dependent two-week completion forecast is not evidence of an exact realized completion date.
The April 2026 retrospective's 'last fall' wording does not support finer than season precision for completion.

route_bindings.basis: The September release identifies B41 on the corridor, and the April briefing explicitly identifies B41 as traveling in the Flatbush Avenue bus lanes.
The April briefing explicitly identifies B67 as traveling in the Flatbush Avenue bus lanes.

route_scope_adjudication.scope_boundary: The route bindings are attached only through delivered serves_route relations on the Livingston Street-to-State Street Phase 1 project unit. Other routes associated with the umbrella Flatbush corridor are not inherited.

treatment_adjudication.location: Flatbush Avenue between Livingston Street and State Street
treatment_adjudication.basis: Both official sources identify the same two-block center-running bus-lane installation, and the retrospective confirms that exact bounded treatment was delivered.
excluded_from_occurrence: State Street-to-Grand Army Plaza Phase 2 center-running bus lanes

late_fall_2026_forecast.disposition: Fold duplicate source observations into one planned season-precision forecast. Do not convert the forecast to delivery or inherit the Phase 1 route/treatment scope.

implementation_goal_2025.disposition: Fold duplicate observations into one planned year-precision goal. A goal is not a realized onset and cannot inherit the distinct Phase 1 delivery.

spring_summer_2025_proposal.disposition: Fold duplicate proposal observations into one planned season-precision milestone. Preserve it as planning history, not delivery evidence.

fall_2025_markings_forecast.disposition: Retain as a separate planned broader-corridor markings-and-monitoring forecast. It does not establish realized treatment scope or duplicate the bounded center-running Phase 1 occurrence.

delivered_umbrella_relation.disposition: Correct the assertion to delivered because the April retrospective is explicit, while retaining the bounded Phase 1 subproject as the only source of studyable route and atomic-treatment scope.

double_count_control.single_occurrence_rule: Project one operational occurrence at 2025-09 month precision for the bounded two-block Phase 1 installation start, with exactly B41 and B67 and exactly one atomic center-running-bus-lane treatment.
double_count_control.completion_milestone_rule: The Fall 2025 completion event remains canonical timeline history for the same implementation unit and is not a second occurrence.
double_count_control.planning_milestone_rule: The 2025 goal, Spring/Summer 2025 proposal, Fall 2025 markings forecast, and Late Fall 2026 opening forecast remain planned and cannot found realized occurrences.
double_count_control.scope_inheritance_rule: Do not infer routes or treatments from the umbrella Flatbush Avenue project; only the bounded project's delivered route and treatment relations are projectable.
double_count_control.phase_boundary_rule: Do not mix Phase 2 or wider-corridor elements into the Phase 1 treatment bundle.
